Storm Check

Post-storm inspection for villas, second homes and high-end properties in Madeira.

Madeira is known for its mild climate, Atlantic views and year-round quality of life. At the same time, the island is fully exposed to changing weather systems moving across the ocean. Strong wind, heavy rain and unstable weather periods can affect properties very differently depending on altitude, hillside exposure, coastal position and surrounding terrain.

That is exactly why we offer our Storm Check Service. After storms, periods of heavy rain or unusually strong wind, we inspect your property on site and review the visible condition of the house, outdoor areas and relevant access points.

Why a Storm Check makes sense in Madeira

Many premium properties on Madeira are used as second homes or seasonal residences. During these periods of absence, small changes can remain unnoticed until they become larger problems.

After storms, it is often not the dramatic damage that causes the biggest issue, but the quieter details.

  • shifted roof areas or loosened exterior elements
  • moved furniture or objects outside
  • water accumulation and blocked drainage points
  • moisture in vulnerable transition areas
  • visible wind pressure effects on terraces and gardens

A structured inspection gives owners exactly what they need from a distance: clarity, transparency and a reliable assessment of the current situation.

What we inspect during a Storm Check

Our inspection focuses on the visible areas that usually matter most after storms, strong wind and heavy rain.

Exterior areas and first visual inspection

We inspect, among other things:

  • visible roof areas
  • façades and exterior surfaces
  • terraces and railings
  • windows, doors and sliding elements
  • loose or displaced items in outdoor areas

Especially in exposed coastal or hillside locations, wind and rain can create considerable pressure. A careful visual inspection helps identify potential damage early.

Gardens and outdoor areas

Many villas and high-end apartments on Madeira include large terraces, gardens or pool areas.

After a storm we typically check:

  • fallen branches or damaged plants
  • changes within landscaped areas
  • condition of outdoor furniture
  • pool areas and pool covers
  • paths, walls and other exterior structures

Moisture, rainwater and sensitive zones

Heavy rain can bring a large amount of water in a short period of time. We therefore pay close attention to:

  • gutters and drainage points
  • visible water accumulation
  • moisture marks in critical transition areas
  • areas that should continue to be monitored

Early detection of moisture is one of the most important factors in preventing long-term damage in high-end properties.

Clear feedback instead of uncertainty

After the inspection, owners receive a clear and understandable update.

  • concise inspection summary
  • photo documentation of relevant areas
  • calm assessment of visible irregularities
  • guidance on whether observation or further action is advisable

This clarity matters because owners need to make decisions from a distance without having to guess what is happening on site.

Part of our Property Care concept – or available separately

The Storm Check Service is part of our wider Property Care concept and complements the regular supervision of high-end properties in Madeira.

At the same time, this inspection can also be booked independently after strong storms or intense periods of rain and wind, when owners want quick certainty about the condition of their property.

Which properties benefit most

Storm Checks are especially valuable for:

  • villas in exposed locations
  • high-end apartments with sea views
  • second homes left vacant for longer periods
  • residences with large terraces and outdoor structures

The service is also useful before an owner arrival or guest stay, because it helps restore confidence that the property is in a reliable and well-presented condition.

Protection, clarity and peace of mind

A premium property in Madeira is more than a building. It is a retreat, an investment and often an important personal place at certain times of the year.

With our Storm Check Service, your property is inspected carefully on site, you receive a clear assessment and you know that your home remains under watch even when you are not on the island yourself.

We use cookies to operate the website reliably and improve usage. You can accept or decline. Details are in the privacy policy. Privacy
